outputLanguage.title: Output language
outputLanguage.description: Optional. Specify the response language using the appropriate two-character language code or five-character locale code (for example, en_US, en_GB, es, es_MX).

isPreviewOnly.title: Preview Only
isPreviewOnly.description: Internal flag. When true, resolves the prompt without calling the LLM. Leave unchecked — this stays false for normal use.
